prompt: Plan SaaS Sprint 1: Old approach (1 big phase with auth+multitenant+teams+SSO) vs New approach (3 focused phases: auth, data ingestion, dashboard)
assertions: New skill produces plans across multiple phases that can execute in parallel
New skill Phase 1 and Phase 2 plans have zero file overlap (can run simultaneously)
Old skill produces sequential wave chain within a single phase
New skill correctly excludes SSO from Sprint 1 scope
Old skill includes SSO as a forced Wave 3 dependency
New skill has higher max parallelism than old skill
Plans in both approaches have complete task anatomy (files, action, verify, done)
